commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cfbc9b20c444fabf65cfff4b00ac1cd4cd4b5617)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Mattermost native model-picker dialog open, refresh, and submit handling, slash channel fallback behavior, tests, and Mattermost docs updates.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: when channel lookup is forbidden, slash authorization can infer channel info and open the dialog, but dialog submit calls resolveChannelInfo again without that fallback.
commands.review_followup: Missing contributor proof is a human-only merge blocker, and the code finding needs a focused fix before normal review can continue.

target.title: feat(mattermost): add /model dialog picker
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: Mattermost `/oc_model` and `/oc_models` still relied on the older message picker, so they could not use Mattermost's richer dialog flow.
- Why it matters: the Discord picker already feels native and multi-step; Mattermost needed a comparable native picker path instead of staying button-first.
- What changed: plain `/oc_model` and `/oc_models` now open a Mattermost dialog when `trigger_id` is available, dialog refresh/submit callbacks stay inside the Mattermost extension, and the final apply still routes through the existing shared `/model` command path.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no shared interactive-core expansion, no unrelated config/schema work, and the older message picker still remains as fallback when a dialog cannot be opened.

## Links

- Issue/PR refs: none

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/client.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/interactions.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/model-picker.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/slash-http.send-config.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/slash-http.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/channels/mattermost.md extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/client.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/client.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/interactions.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/interactions.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/model-picker.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/model-picker.test.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/monitor.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/slash-http.ts extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/slash-http.send-config.test.ts`
- Manual real-server validation on a Mattermost deployment: native `oc_*` slash commands registered against the gateway callback URL, plain `/oc_model` reached the new dialog-backed flow, and the slash path no longer hard-failed when channel lookup returned `403`.

## Behavior Notes

- The new picker is Mattermost-owned UI: dialog open, refresh, and submit live in `extensions/mattermost/**`.
- If Mattermost does not provide a usable `trigger_id`, OpenClaw falls back to the existing message-based picker instead of breaking `/oc_model`.
- Slash-command authorization now falls back to channel information already present in the slash payload when `GET /channels/<id>` is forbidden, which fixes `/oc_model` in channels where the bot cannot fetch channel metadata directly.
target.author: mukhtharcm
